Search tips

  • Select "match all" to require all fields.
  • Select "match any" to find at least one field.
  • Use quotation marks to search as a phrase, such as "Stranger in a Strange Land."
  • The Library Catalog is not case sensitive. Searches may be entered in any case. The only exception is that Boolean operators (AND, OR, NOT) should be capitalized.
  • See more search tips.
Chat with a Librarian
Chat requires JavaScript.

No librarians are currently available. For assistance, email asklib@duke.edu — you will receive a response in a few hours
